title: adhatoda aurantiaca
intro: Adhatoda aurantiaca, also known as 'Swertia chirata', is a perennial plant species native to various parts of the world, including Asia and Africa. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Adhatoda aurantiaca include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural remedy for various gastrointestinal problems. The herbal preparations of Adhatoda aurantiaca typically include extracts in the form of capsules, tablets, or tea infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
